Serving Manalapan, NJ & 50-mile radius

AI That Runs Your Business Operations

We install and customize AI agents that handle appointments, generate leads, fix websites, and automate your business — so you can focus on what you do best.

Get Your AI AgentSee How It Works

What Your AI Agent Can Do

Custom-built for your business needs. Bookings, leads, support — all automated.

Appointments

Book, reschedule, and cancel appointments 24/7. Syncs with your calendar automatically.

Lead Generation

Capture leads from your website, qualify prospects, and follow up automatically.

Website Fixes

Monitor your site, fix issues, update content, and keep everything running smoothly.

Customer Support

Answer questions, handle inquiries, and provide instant support to your customers.

How It Works

From discovery to go-live in days, not weeks.

1

Discovery

We learn your business — your workflows, pain points, and what takes up your time.

2

Setup

We build and customize your AI agent, integrate with your tools, and train it on your business.

3

Go Live

Your AI starts working. We monitor, optimize, and handle any tweaks you need.

Simple Pricing

No setup fees. Cancel anytime. Local support included.

Starter

$299/month

Perfect for solopreneurs and small shops

  • Appointment booking & cancellation
  • Basic FAQ responses
  • Email notifications
  • 1 calendar integration
  • Business hours support
Most Popular

Growth

$599/month

For growing businesses with more needs

  • Everything in Starter
  • Lead capture & qualification
  • Website monitoring & fixes
  • SMS + Email notifications
  • 3 calendar integrations
  • Priority support

Full Service

$999/month

White-glove service for demanding businesses

  • Everything in Growth
  • Custom integrations
  • Advanced automation workflows
  • Dedicated phone line
  • Unlimited calendar sync
  • 24/7 priority support
